title: PR-2 projection v2 and Worker 1x/2x/4x host
summary: As the sole protocol writer, implement ADR-0018 schema-4 GameSession projection v2 and Worker-owned pause plus 1x/2x/4x scheduling with fail-closed validation.
acceptance: ProtocolVersion remains 1 with no new message family; envelope schema becomes exactly 4 and default product InitSession/Ready negotiates exactly GameSession projection version 2 before active, while unknown/newer schema or projection, wrong session, malformed lanes and incoherent basis fail closed without fixture fallback

Projection v2 losslessly carries all eight autonomy states, stable work kind, target entity and/or target cell, bounded route window/cursor/total/navigation basis, progressQ16, state/step-entered ticks, need/schedule/capability/offer/path/reservation/job basis, structured reason v2 plus read-only inspection suggestion, and selected-resident schedule/capability/priority-need facts
Every added field is bounded and required by a PR-2 product gate; v2 adds no localized prose, direct-job/work-priority/selection/build command, client authority, save bytes or PR-3 surface

SetSpeed uses explicit speedMultiplier 1|2|4; Pause remains a separate boolean and preserves the requested multiplier. The Worker produces effective 30/60/120 TPS using the unchanged fixed basis of three ticks per 100ms quantum, while paused effective rate is zero and values 0 or 3 fail closed for v2

Wall-time debt/catch-up remains Worker-only, monotonic and bounded to ten quanta per callback and the reviewed debt cap; sim-core receives integer ticks only, pause/resume does not replay paused time, and shutdown/disconnect stops scheduling exactly once

Render/UI delivery remains coherent and latest-wins while reliable messages remain ordered/non-droppable; route/reason projection size, stale snapshot drops, reliable depth and scheduler debt are measured and bounded

WM-0172 atomically moves the default product module graph and minimal Web session negotiation to schema4/v2. Any v1 bridge is isolated to explicit test/diagnostics entrypoints, retains historical 0/1/2/3 semantics, cannot accept 4x or satisfy PR-2, and is mechanically absent from default imports

Fixed-seed Worker/headless hashes, 36000/100000-tick conservation, package boundaries and the entire workspace quality gate pass with no save/load, runtime dependency, product presentation, PR-3 or release change

history.details: Assigned exclusive ADR-0018 schema4/projection-v2, explicit speedMultiplier and atomic default-negotiation ownership after WM-0171; remains proposed and unclaimed.

proposedProtocolOwnership: sole writer for schema4, GameSession projection v2, speedMultiplier validation and default negotiation
saveLoadStance: No save payload, codec, format, platform adapter or compatibility change. RequestLoad for GameSession remains unsupported and fail-closed.
forbiddenPaths: autonomy/job/resource behavior changes owned by WM-0170/WM-0171 beyond the exact core speed-type migration files
apps/web/src/shell-bootstrap.ts, packages/renderer-pixi/**, packages/ui-react/** or full HUD/presentation implementation owned by WM-0173
leaving v1 in the default product module graph, accepting unknown/newer schema, falling back to fixture state or silently treating 3 as 4
new protocol message family, unbounded projection lanes, UI-owned ticks, dropped reliable messages, save/load mutation or new dependency
PR-3 work priority/direct job/selection/build command, release, telemetry, account, paid service or public compatibility scope
executionLane: simulation-engineer; Spark is prohibited because this is the sole public protocol/schema/Worker scheduling and cross-package speed migration
singleWriterRule: WM-0172 is the only schema/projection/speed writer and starts only after WM-0171 is independently verified, integrated and done. WM-0173..WM-0175 remain proposed and unclaimed.
